languages.text: {n}Кассия задумчиво рассматривает полотно, едва касаясь завитушек на тяжелой раме тонкими пальцами.{/n} "Работа искусного и несомненно талантливого живописца, Лорд-капитан. Исполнение столь филигранно, что перед моим взором мелькают отблески чувств того, кто изображен. Будто... будто мастер запечатлел на холсте не только его облик, но и душу".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]{n}Кассия задумчиво рассматривает полотно, едва касаясь завитушек на тяжелой раме тонкими пальцами.{/n} "Работа искусного и несомненно талантливого живописца, Лорд-капитан. Исполнение столь филигранно, что перед моим взором мелькают отблески чувств того, кто изображен. Будто... будто мастер запечатлел на холсте не только его облик, но и душу".

Исполнение столь филигранно, что перед моим взором мелькают отблески чувств того, кто изображен. Будто... будто мастер запечатлел на холсте не только его облик, но и душу".
traits.speaker: CassiaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Cassia studies the canvas thoughtfully, barely touching the scrollwork of the heavy frame with her slender fingers.{/n} "The work of a skilled and undoubtedly talented painter, Lord Captain. The execution is so exquisite that glimpses of the model's own emotions flicker before my gaze. As if... As if the master has captured not only the man's likeness upon the canvas, but his very soul."
languages.original_text: {n}Кассия задумчиво рассматривает полотно, едва касаясь завитушек на тяжелой раме тонкими пальцами.{/n} "Работа искусного и несомненно талантливого живописца, Лорд-капитан. Исполнение столь филигранно, что перед моим взором мелькают отблески чувств того, кто изображен. Будто... будто мастер запечатлел на холсте не только его облик, но и душу".

The execution is so exquisite that glimpses of the sitter's own emotions flicker before my gaze. As if... as if the master has captured not only his likeness upon the canvas, but his very soul."

The execution is so exquisite that glimpses of the model's own emotions flicker before my gaze. As if... As if the master has captured not only the man's likeness upon the canvas, but his very soul."

languages.text: {n}Cassia studiert nachdenklich die Leinwand, ohne den schweren Rahmen mit ihren schlanken Fingern zu berühren.{/n} "Das Werk eines geschickten und zweifellos talentierten Malers, Lord-Captain. Die Ausführung ist so exquisit, dass Funken der Emotionen des Porträtierten vor meinem geistigen Auge tanzen. Als hätte ... Als hätte der Künstler nicht nur sein Äußeres, sondern seine Seele auf der Leinwand verewigt."
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia studies the canvas thoughtfully, barely touching the scrollwork of the heavy frame with her slender fingers.{/n} "The work of a skilled and undoubtedly talented painter, Lord Captain. The execution is so exquisite that glimpses of the model's own emotions flicker before my gaze. As if... As if the master has captured not only the man's likeness upon the canvas, but his very soul."

traits.locale_text: {n}Cassia studiert nachdenklich die Leinwand, ohne den schweren Rahmen mit ihren schlanken Fingern zu berühren.{/n} "Das Werk eines geschickten und zweifellos talentierten Malers, Lord-Captain. Die Ausführung ist so exquisit, dass Funken der Emotionen des Porträtierten vor meinem geistigen Auge tanzen. Als hätte ... Als hätte der Künstler nicht nur sein Äußeres, sondern seine Seele auf der Leinwand verewigt."

languages.text: {n}Cassia étudie la toile attentivement, effleurant de ses doigts fins les arabesques du cadre massif.{/n} « C'est l'œuvre d'un peintre compétent, et très certainement talentueux, {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}. L'exécution est d'un tel raffinement que les émotions du modèle m'apparaissent furtivement. C'est comme si... Comme si le maître avait non seulement capturé l'apparence, mais aussi l'âme de l'homme. »
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia studies the canvas thoughtfully, barely touching the scrollwork of the heavy frame with her slender fingers.{/n} "The work of a skilled and undoubtedly talented painter, Lord Captain. The execution is so exquisite that glimpses of the model's own emotions flicker before my gaze. As if... As if the master has captured not only the man's likeness upon the canvas, but his very soul."

traits.locale_text: {n}Cassia étudie la toile attentivement, effleurant de ses doigts fins les arabesques du cadre massif.{/n} « C'est l'œuvre d'un peintre compétent, et très certainement talentueux, {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}. L'exécution est d'un tel raffinement que les émotions du modèle m'apparaissent furtivement. C'est comme si... Comme si le maître avait non seulement capturé l'apparence, mais aussi l'âme de l'homme. »

languages.text: {n}卡西娅若有所思地端详着画布，纤细的手指若有似无地拂过厚重画框上的涡卷纹饰。{/n}“这定是出自一位技艺娴熟、天赋卓绝的画师之手，舰长大人。笔触之精妙入微，竟让那画中人的思绪在我眼前隐隐浮现。仿佛……仿佛那位大师封存于画布之上的，不仅是他的形貌，更是他的魂魄。”
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia studies the canvas thoughtfully, barely touching the scrollwork of the heavy frame with her slender fingers.{/n} "The work of a skilled and undoubtedly talented painter, Lord Captain. The execution is so exquisite that glimpses of the model's own emotions flicker before my gaze. As if... As if the master has captured not only the man's likeness upon the canvas, but his very soul."

traits.locale_text: {n}卡西娅若有所思地端详着画布，纤细的手指若有似无地拂过厚重画框上的涡卷纹饰。{/n}“这定是出自一位技艺娴熟、天赋卓绝的画师之手，舰长大人。笔触之精妙入微，竟让那画中人的思绪在我眼前隐隐浮现。仿佛……仿佛那位大师封存于画布之上的，不仅是他的形貌，更是他的魂魄。”

languages.text: {n}Cassia estudia cuidadosamente el lienzo, tocando ligeramente el marco con sus finos dedos.{/n} «Es obra de un pintor con mucha habilidad y un talento innegable, Lord Capitán. La ejecución es tan magistral que mi mirada puede captar trazas de las emociones del modelo. Es como si... como si el artista no solo hubiera plasmado su aspecto sobre el lienzo, sino su misma alma».
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia studies the canvas thoughtfully, barely touching the scrollwork of the heavy frame with her slender fingers.{/n} "The work of a skilled and undoubtedly talented painter, Lord Captain. The execution is so exquisite that glimpses of the model's own emotions flicker before my gaze. As if... As if the master has captured not only the man's likeness upon the canvas, but his very soul."

traits.locale_text: {n}Cassia estudia cuidadosamente el lienzo, tocando ligeramente el marco con sus finos dedos.{/n} «Es obra de un pintor con mucha habilidad y un talento innegable, Lord Capitán. La ejecución es tan magistral que mi mirada puede captar trazas de las emociones del modelo. Es como si... como si el artista no solo hubiera plasmado su aspecto sobre el lienzo, sino su misma alma».

languages.text: [カシアック草稿は]{n}思慮深げに絵を眺め、重い額縁に描かれた曲線に細い指でかろうじて触れる。{/n}「熟練した、間違いなく才能のある画家の作品です、大尉殿。描かれている人物の心情が垣間見えるような、とても精巧な仕上がりです。まるで、顔だけでなく魂まで写し取ったかのようです」。
languages.original_text: [DraftKassia]{n}contemplates the painting thoughtfully, barely touching the curlicues on the heavy frame with slender fingers.{/n} "The work of a skilled and undoubtedly talented painter, Lord Captain. The execution is so filigree that glimpses of the feelings of the one depicted flash before my eyes. It's as if. as if the master had captured not only his face but also his soul."

languages.text: {n}Cassia, ağır çerçevenin oymalarına ince parmaklarıyla zar zor dokunarak tuvali düşünceli bir şekilde inceliyor.{/n} "Usta ve şüphesiz yetenekli bir ressamın eseri Lord Kaptan. Uygulama o kadar zarif ki modelin kendi duygularının pırıltıları, gözlerimin önünde titreşiyor. Sanki... Sanki usta; sadece adamın benzerliğini değil, ruhunu da tuvale aktarmış gibi."
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia studies the canvas thoughtfully, barely touching the scrollwork of the heavy frame with her slender fingers.{/n} "The work of a skilled and undoubtedly talented painter, Lord Captain. The execution is so exquisite that glimpses of the model's own emotions flicker before my gaze. As if... As if the master has captured not only the man's likeness upon the canvas, but his very soul."

Uygulama o kadar zarif ki modelin kendi duygularının pırıltıları, gözlerimin önünde titreşiyor. Sanki... Sanki usta; sadece adamın benzerliğini değil, ruhunu da tuvale aktarmış gibi."
